title: FIRST AMENDMENT
text_head: FIRST AMENDMENT TO AMENDED AND RESTATED FIRST LIEN CREDIT AGREEMENT, dated as of February 14, 2025, by and among The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company, as Borrower, the Lenders party hereto, and JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., as Administrative Agent. Reference is made to that certain Amended and Restated First Lien Credit Agreement dated as of March 26, 2021. This Amendment modifies the interest rate provisions to reference Term SOFR.
